## Describe the bug
<!--- A clear and concise description of what the bug is.
Before filing the issue please update your repository and run `make sync_virtual_environment` to make sure your virtual environment and the lock file are up-to-date and the bug is still present.
-->


## Failing Test
<!---
Please put the code (ideally in the form of a unit test) which fails below.

e.g.

```python
def test_bug_12():
    # Python code here which fails because of the bug
    # This is best if other developers can simply copy and paste this test in
    # order to run it
```
If existing tests fail post the output of `make test` here.
-->

## Expected behavior
<!--- A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen. -->

## Screenshots
<!--- If you have output that can not be postet as text here, please add a screenshot -->

## System
<!--- Please complete the following information. -->

- OS: [e.g. Windows, Linux, macOS]
- Python version [e.g. Python 3.11]
- Please also upload your `uv.lock` file

## Additional context
<!--- Add any other context about the problem here. -->
